steps.title: Check number and possession
steps.content: The blank follows "composed of," so it needs a plural noun for the works that make up the novel. The possessive should refer to one novel and its protagonist.

steps.title: Rule out apostrophe errors
steps.content: B and C incorrectly make "poems" singular possessive. C and D also make "novel" plural possessive. The phrase needs plural "poems" and singular possessive "novel's." The answer is A.
